milestoneTitle: M10.15 — Save point. No functional changes since M10.14; cache-bust + version sync only. Hero-icon experiment under the Dashboard title was tried (JPEG with mix-blend-mode, then inline SVG approximation) and rolled back by the user — the section-head + CSS revert to their pre-experiment state, file untouched. This commit marks a stable backup point on main before next session veers into a revamp branch. Tagged `backup/pre-revamp-2026-04-20`; backup branch `backup/pre-revamp` pushed alongside so main can keep moving without losing this baseline.
